creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Ports gcc6 & gcc7 have been updated to gcc6-6.4.0_3 & gcc7-7.2.0_4.
These updates fix pthread_create problem that I mentioned in comment 17.

If you upgrade gcc to gcc6-6.4.0_3,
Handbrake open file problem will be fixed.

After upgrading gcc, you need to restart Handbrake.
No patch is needed to handbrake port.
Rebuilding handbrake is not needed neither.
